summary: Phase F continuation testing complete. All 4 drawer migrations (OrdersPageOps, CustomersPageMerged, VendorListPage, AdminContentCenterPage) verified using StandardDrawerShell. Document Preview panel in Settings Hub Document Branding tab verified with Invoice Preview and Quote Preview tabs working correctly. All drawers close on ESC key, X button, and backdrop click.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all drawer migrations and Document Preview panel verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase F drawer migrations complete. All 4 pages (OrdersPageOps, CustomersPageMerged, VendorListPage, AdminContentCenterPage) now use StandardDrawerShell. Document Preview panel added to InvoiceBrandingSettings with Invoice and Quote preview tabs. Note: Order Operations page shows empty state when no orders exist - this is expected behavior.
